Name: Jasper RDM Events
Description: General-purpose Red Mage event profile for PvE. Keeps Addle/Magick Barrier support, earlier emergency self/party/MT Vercure, smart AoE and melee/mana spender toggle safety, optional cooldown holds, wipe/zone reset scaffolding, raise toggles, and optional out-of-combat Sprint for roulette-safe play.

Events.Name: Addle & Magick Barrier
Events.Description: Uses Addle plus job mitigation on raidwide damage.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Red Mage toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Zone Change
Events.Description: Restores default Red Mage toggles after zone changes.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles Wipe
Events.Description: Restores default Red Mage toggles after wipes.

Events.Name: Vercure Self Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Vercure on self at 60 percent HP for solo and public-duty recovery.

Events.Name: Vercure Emergency
Events.Description: Emergency Vercure for synced/general content at 45 percent HP; ACR damage remains primary.

Events.Name: Addle TB
Events.Description: Uses Addle for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Events.Name: Vercure MT Emergency
Events.Description: Uses Vercure on the main tank at 60 percent HP when healer recovery is behind.

Events.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Events.Description: Keeps Red Mage core damage, melee-combo, movement, and raise toggles enabled in combat.

Events.Name: AoE Pack Toggle Release
Events.Description: Keeps normal UseAOE/SmartAOE enabled and Save CD disabled during multi-target pulls without forcing AoE mode.

Conditions.Name: [ST] <= 45% HP
Conditions.Description: Single-target party emergency threshold for Vercure support.

Conditions.Name: Self HP <= 60%
Conditions.Description: Self HP threshold for conservative emergency Vercure.

Conditions.Name: Target No Addle
Conditions.Description: Target does not already have Addle or equivalent magic damage down.

Conditions.Name: MT <= 60%
Conditions.Description: Main tank emergency threshold for Vercure support.

Logics.Name: Addle & Magick Barrier
Logics.Description: Magic raidwide mitigation without a single-target enemy-count gate.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Red Mage ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Vercure Self Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Vercure on self at 60 percent HP for solo and public-duty recovery.

Logics.Name: Vercure Emergency
Logics.Description: Emergency Vercure for synced/general content at 45 percent HP; ACR damage remains primary.

Logics.Name: Addle TB
Logics.Description: Uses Addle for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Logics.Name: Vercure MT Emergency
Logics.Description: Uses Vercure on the main tank at 60 percent HP when healer recovery is behind.

Logics.Name: DPS Toggle Safety
Logics.Description: Keeps Red Mage damage, melee-combo, movement, raise, and burst toggles enabled in combat so imported or held states do not leave the job passive.

Logics.Name: AoE Pack Toggle Release
Logics.Description: Keeps normal UseAOE/SmartAOE enabled and Save CD disabled during multi-target pulls without forcing AoE mode.

Items.Name: Boss Hold
Items.Description: Optional dungeon-routing helper that saves major damage cooldowns near the end of a boss. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Group Hold
Items.Description: Optional dungeon-routing helper that saves major damage cooldowns when a trash pack is nearly dead. Leave off for normal play.

Items.Name: Raid Mit
Items.Description: Uses Addle and Magick Barrier for raidwide damage.

Items.Name: MT Cure
Items.Description: Emergency Vercure on the main tank.

Items.Name: Party Cure
Items.Description: Emergency Vercure on low party members.
